title: Example Module
description: Example module demonstrating the required structure for module imports

module_questions.text: Is physical access to [specific asset] restricted to authorized personnel?
Is video coverage implemented for [specific location] to support incident detection?
Is a user-accessible method provided to request assistance or report an emergency?

module_ofcs.ofc_text: Consider implementing [specific physical security measure] at [location] to [achieve outcome].
An option for consideration is [specific measure] to [achieve outcome].

risk_drivers.driver_text: Unauthorized access to [system] may enable physical tampering or unsafe conditions at [location].
Payment skimming or data theft at [location] may increase criminal targeting of [location] and associated users.
